entries.summary: Bootstrap: Initial canonization of gavel-ai (large-repo strategy)

Complete oneshot workflow convergence: fixed processor bugs (deep copy, retry backoff, exception handling), implemented judge/list/milestone CLI commands, added integration tests (927 pass), implemented C-3-5 conversation timeout/error handling with retry logic and error classification

Added typed step-result attrs (processor_results, evaluation_results, test_subject, model_variant) to LocalRunContext; extracted compute_config_hash to storage/utils.py; migrated 5 hash tests to test_utils.py
Added typed step-result attrs to LocalRunContext and extracted compute_config_hash to storage/utils.py. Foundation for multi-variant DRY refactor.

Completed DRY refactor: multi-variant loop in ScenarioProcessorStep, variant-grouped JudgeRunnerStep, inline join in ReportRunnerStep, simplified judge CLI. Deleted ReJudge, ResultsExporter. 905 tests pass at 83% coverage.

Completed judge-dry-fix: DRY refactored oneshot pipeline on OutputRecord, multi-variant loop, variant-grouped judging, inline join in report, simplified judge CLI. Deleted ReJudge + ResultsExporter. 905 tests, 83% coverage.

Completed: Added gavel-ai-level rate-limit retry for DeepEval judge evaluations. Generalized retry_with_backoff() for reuse across processors, judges, and future layers. 910 tests pass at 83% coverage.
Added gavel-skill agent skill: eval assistant with CLI reference, config schema, scenario format guide, and judges reference

finish-oneshot initiative merged: DeterministicMetric hierarchy (ClassifierMetric + RegressionMetric via scikit-learn), config_ref TOML judge resolution, .workflow_status step tracking, snapshot_run_config prompt copy, expanded ValidatorStep (variant resolution, prompt existence, empty scenario check), OneShotReporter score-averaging exclusion on processor errors, deterministic judge HTML section, --template classification/regression scaffold, in-situ scaffold fix, Google Vertex AI ADC auth support.

Extended oneshot_reporter._build_context with total_execution_time_s, input_source, subject_names, scenario_count, and collapse threshold constants. ReportRunnerStep populates input_source and subject_names in RunData.metadata. 6 new unit tests added.

Rewrote oneshot.html: new header (execution time, eval name), Eval Summary (LLM/deterministic split), Performance Summary (subject heading, renamed column), Scenario Detail (table layout, collapsible inputs, truncated responses). Updated HTML assertions in test_oneshot_reporter.py.

Upgraded OneShot HTML report: header now shows execution time and eval name; Eval Summary splits LLM vs deterministic judge sections with per-subject sub-headings; Performance Summary adds per-subject sub-headings and renames 'Avg Turn Time' to 'Avg Response Time'; Scenario Detail replaced with table layout, collapsible inputs (>200 chars), and truncatable responses (>500 chars). ReportRunnerStep populates input_source and subject_names in RunData.metadata. OneShotReporter._build_context injects total_execution_time_s, input_source, subject_names, scenario_count, and threshold constants.
